main.title: The Funky Lagos Orchestra
main.logo: Logo of The Funky Lagos Orchestra

about.subtitle: The Group
about.bloc-text1: Born in the heart of the Vendée bocage, The Funky Lagos Orchestra blends warm African rhythms with the raw energy of funk. An explosive meeting between tradition and modernity.
about.bloc-text2: 8 musicians on stage, brass that sets the room on fire, hypnotic percussion and a lead voice that carries the audience to every corner of the world.
